TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ay-de-hua.Cen-na (kamu nu Hulam: śĄõŚĺ∑ŤŹĮ¬∑Ť©ĻÁīć) == Ay-dehaw.cen-na (kamu nu Amilika: Edward Jenner,caypic-sipsiw mihcaan lima a bulad caypic a demiad- caywal-tulu a mihcaan cacay a bulad tunem a demiad) , FRS FRCPE,pangangan han ci Ayde-hau. Cin-na caay sa ci Cen-na, misaydan nu Ing-kuo, nikinkiwan atu ni cuduhan u tibeni atu sapihaymawan tu tibenian a nikasingangan, caypic-siwnem mihcaan lima a bulad malahciay nida tu libung a sapicucuk nu sapayuan u sayaway nu kitakidan a sapayuan, ci Cen-na tuni ka tukuh ayda pangangan han u (caay tu ka ala nu libung a laliwamaan). śĄõŚĺ∑ŤŹĮ¬∑Ť©ĻÁīć(ŤčĪśĖá:Edward Jenner,1749ŚĻī5śúą17śó•‚ÄĒ1823ŚĻī1śúą26śó•),FRS FRCPE, ". i ayaw ni Cen-na, tademaw u sapiala tu tibeni nu picucukan sakacaay ka ala nu libung, uyniyan a kawaw i tida i Cuon-kuo, Ing-tu atu Fea-cuo matenes ku nipidaydayan, nika sakabalihenawan, caay kaw silahciay. nika ni kinkiwan a sapatahekal ni Cen-na a tibeni tu sapicucuk kapah kuyda, maadih ku nika kapah, haymaw satu tayda i hekalan nu kanatalan, mapacuwah namin ku udip nu maudipay. Caysiw-walsep mihcaan kitakiday nu pulung nu padekuan mihapu, u tibeni itini i kitakidan malawpes mapatay tu. kawaw ni Cen-na a nikinkiwan tanektek tu , ladayen nida ci Lu-yi.Pase-de, Luopuo-te'.kehe' a tademaw mikilin aca tu duma a sapingaay tu imelang. . u mahida maudip śó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ ci Cen-na pilecuhan i caypic-sipsiw mihcaan lima a bulad caypic a demiad ni lecuhan i Ing-kuo Ke-luo-se-te'-pei-ke'-li' a buksi nu lumaan, i pilucuhan nida tu Ke-luo-se-te' micudad, dikud i Lun-tun a cacayan tu ci Lu-de-luo a misaydangan minanam tu sapisenataw tu bangesan. sadikuday taluma' aca i nalecuhan, i niyadu' satu malamisaydan. malaheci ku sakay niw-duo ÁôľśėéÁČõÁóėśé•Á®ģŤ°ď tawya a Ingkuo u tademaw ku sasapalan mitaneng , kasilahecian mangalay miala tu i udipay a bena' nu imelangay, u adidiay a sapisenad nu katini' ku sapinanam i banges nu imelangay. i nanikinkiwan a imelangay nu tademaw caay kaw nu nikalalidan tu bala'an, sisa hatidaay tu nu tademaw caay tu ka hacica ku tahekalay nu ten-hua. uyniyan ni tanengan yadah henay ku la'cusay, u nitanengan a tademaw usitin-huaay a tademaw, sisa idaw ku mapatayay. nu nitanengan a tademaw kapahtu ku udip sa, nika amica ku nikakapah milalid tu tepalay a tademawan, sisa kanca aidaw ku laa'd sa. . tawyaay a niyadu' nu Ingkuo idaw ku nakamuan sa, anu namalalidtu tu niw-duo, acaay tu ka lalid tu ten-hua. nu mipuleciay tu cucu nu katalan a tataynaan nu tademaw namalaliday namin tu libungay tu niw-duo. ci Cen-na anu tatengan ku kamu nu i hekalay a tademaw, u niw-duo atu ten-hua u malecaday sa, anu mahida nanicucukan tu niw-duo taneng cucukan tu ten-hua u kapahay ku mahiniay sa. . nikahinian anipatahekalan, caypic- siwnem mihcaan lima a bulad caysip a dimiad, ci Cen-na malingatu tu mikinkiw tu niw-duo a kawawan. cinida micucuk tu niw-duo a kawawan, sakapahen nida ku nipibanaw tu katini' itidan nida i waluay a mihcaan nanay a wawaw ci Cen-muse. Faipu-se tu tusaay a abalaan, banaten nida paladuka, pacumuden nida tu niw-duo, metalaw asiten-hua. namalalid satu kida tatamaan a wawa tu niw-duo, enemay a lalipayan mangaay tu. nikuda ci Cen-na cucukan naca nida kida tatamaan a wawa tu ten-hua, alaw caay ka lalid kida tatamaan a wawa tu libungan, itini palutatengan cinida u niw-duo mikapah tu ten-hua macunus ku kapah nu udip. (James Phipps) . ci Cen-na matineng tu tuyu nipicucukan tu libung nikasilahecian, mangalay ci nida tu nika cacayan a demiad malawpes ku ten-hua i tini i kitakidan. tahsepi han nida masasuini namin misaicelang ku kitakiday a tademaw sadikuday malaheci tu, caysiw-walsep mihcaan ina ten-hua lawpes satu itini i kitakida. . duma a nipainŚÖ∂ŚģÉŤ≤ĘÁćĽ nipikinkiwan tu niw-duo a sacucuk, ci Cen-na u manamuhay miadih tu sakalihalay tu hekal a kesya-ciw. wawa nina tu-cun a ayam matineng mialaw tu duma nu ayaman a ti'kuk atu wawa nu duma a ayam micuduh patahekal, ci Cen-na tu ku makaadihay. nu nipihaymawan nida miadih, sisa ci Cen-na maadih nu Ing-kuo hun-ciw-sye-hua itida i caypic-walsiw mihcaan mala yen-se. .
S.PHON: == aj-d…ô-ńßua. ¶…ôn-na (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ******) == aj-d…ôńßaw. ¶…ôn-na (kamu nu amir~…ĺika: …ôdward *…ônn…ôr, ¶ajpi ¶-sipsiw mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad ¶ajpi ¶ a d…ômiad- ¶ajwar~…ĺ-tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad tun…ôm a d…ômiad) , f*s f* ¶p…ô,paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i ajd…ô-ńßau. ¶in-na ¶aaj sa ¶i ¶…ôn-na, misajdan nu iŇč-kuo, nikinkiwan atu ni ¶uduńßan u tib…ôni atu sapińßajmawan tu tib…ônian a nikasiŇčaŇčan, ¶ajpi ¶-siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺańß ¶iaj nida tu r~…ĺibuŇč a sapi ¶u ¶uk nu sapajuan u sajawaj nu kitakidan a sapajuan, ¶i ¶…ôn-na tuni ka tukuńß ajda paŇčaŇčan ńßan u ( ¶aaj tu ka ar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺibuŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺiwamaan). ******(**:…ôdward *…ônn…ôr,*********************),f*s f* ¶p…ô, ". i ajaw ni ¶…ôn-na, tad…ômaw u sapiar~…ĺa tu tib…ôni nu pi ¶u ¶ukan saka ¶aaj ka ar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺibuŇč, ujnijan a kawaw i tida i ¶uon-kuo, iŇč-tu atu f…ôa- ¶uo mat…ôn…ôs ku nipidajdajan, nika sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan, ¶aaj kaw sir~…ĺańß ¶iaj. nika ni kinkiwan a sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ ni ¶…ôn-na a tib…ôni tu sapi ¶u ¶uk kapańß kujda, maadińß ku nika kapańß, ńßajmaw satu tajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺan, mapa ¶uwańß namin ku udip nu maudipaj. ¶ajsiw-war~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan kitakidaj nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu pad…ôkuan mińßapu, u tib…ôni itini i kitakidan mar~…ĺawp…ôs mapataj tu. kawaw ni ¶…ôn-na a nikinkiwan tan…ôkt…ôk tu , r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ¶i r~…ĺu-ji.pas…ô-d…ô, r~…ĺuopuo-t…ô Ē~ °.k…ôńß…ô Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw mikir~…ĺin a ¶a tu duma a sapiŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. . u mańßida maudip **** ¶i ¶…ôn-na pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ¶ajpi ¶-sipsiw mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad ¶ajpi ¶ a d…ômiad ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i iŇč-kuo k…ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ °-p…ôi-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi Ē~ ° a buksi nu r~…ĺumaan, i pir~…ĺu ¶uńßan nida tu k…ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ ° mi ¶udad, dikud i r~…ĺun-tun a ¶a ¶ajan tu ¶i r~…ĺu-d…ô-r~…ĺuo a misajdaŇčan minanam tu sapis…ônataw tu baŇč…ôsan. sadikudaj tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a ¶a i nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, i nijadu Ē~ ° satu mar~…ĺamisajdan. mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku sakaj niw-duo ******* tawja a iŇčkuo u tad…ômaw ku sasapar~…ĺan mitan…ôŇč , kasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian maŇčar~…ĺaj miar~…ĺa tu i udipaj a b…ôna Ē~ ° nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, u adidiaj a sapis…ônad nu katini Ē~ ° ku sapinanam i baŇč…ôs nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj. i nanikinkiwan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj kaw nu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan tu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an, sisa ńßatidaaj tu nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj tu ka ńßa ¶i ¶a ku tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu t…ôn-ńßua. ujnijan ni tan…ôŇčan jadańß ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj, u nitan…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw usitin-ńßuaaj a tad…ômaw, sisa idaw ku mapatajaj. nu nitan…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw kapańßtu ku udip sa, nika ami ¶a ku nikakapańß mir~…ĺar~…ĺid tu t…ôpar~…ĺaj a tad…ômawan, sisa kan ¶a aidaw ku r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d sa. . tawjaaj a nijadu Ē~ ° nu iŇčkuo idaw ku nakamuan sa, anu namar~…ĺar~…ĺidtu tu niw-duo, a ¶aaj tu ka r~…ĺar~…ĺid tu t…ôn-ńßua. nu mipur~…ĺ…ô ¶iaj tu ¶u ¶u nu katar~…ĺan a tatajnaan nu tad…ômaw namar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj namin tu r~…ĺibuŇčaj tu niw-duo. ¶i ¶…ôn-na anu tat…ôŇčan ku kamu nu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw, u niw-duo atu t…ôn-ńßua u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj sa, anu mańßida nani ¶u ¶ukan tu niw-duo tan…ôŇč ¶u ¶ukan tu t…ôn-ńßua u kapańßaj ku mańßiniaj sa. . nikańßinian anipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, ¶ajpi ¶- siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad ¶ajsip a dimiad, ¶i ¶…ôn-na mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mikinkiw tu niw-duo a kawawan. ¶inida mi ¶u ¶uk tu niw-duo a kawawan, sakapańß…ôn nida ku nipibanaw tu katini Ē~ ° itidan nida i war~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan nanaj a wawaw ¶i ¶…ôn-mus…ô. faipu-s…ô tu tusaaj a abar~…ĺaan, banat…ôn nida par~…ĺaduka, pa ¶umud…ôn nida tu niw-duo, m…ôtar~…ĺaw asit…ôn-ńßua. namar~…ĺar~…ĺid satu kida tatamaan a wawa tu niw-duo, …ôn…ômaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan maŇčaaj tu. nikuda ¶i ¶…ôn-na ¶u ¶ukan na ¶a nida kida tatamaan a wawa tu t…ôn-ńßua, ar~…ĺaw ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺid kida tatamaan a wawa tu r~…ĺibuŇčan, itini par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶inida u niw-duo mikapańß tu t…ôn-ńßua ma ¶unus ku kapańß nu udip. (*am…ôs pńßipps) . ¶i ¶…ôn-na matin…ôŇč tu tuju nipi ¶u ¶ukan tu r~…ĺibuŇč nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i nida tu nika ¶a ¶ajan a d…ômiad mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku t…ôn-ńßua i tini i kitakidan. tańßs…ôpi ńßan nida masasuini namin misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku kitakidaj a tad…ômaw sadikudaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu, ¶ajsiw-war~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan ina t…ôn-ńßua r~…ĺawp…ôs satu itini i kitakida. . duma a nipain**** nipikinkiwan tu niw-duo a sa ¶u ¶uk, ¶i ¶…ôn-na u manamuńßaj miadińß tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a k…ôsja- ¶iw. wawa nina tu- ¶un a ajam matin…ôŇč miar~…ĺaw tu duma nu ajaman a ti Ē~ °kuk atu wawa nu duma a ajam mi ¶uduńß patańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶i ¶…ôn-na tu ku makaadińßaj. nu nipińßajmawan nida miadińß, sisa ¶i ¶…ôn-na maadińß nu iŇč-kuo ńßun- ¶iw-sj…ô-ńßua itida i ¶ajpi ¶-war~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa j…ôn-s…ô. .
S.FORM: == Ay-de-hua.Cen-na (kamu nu Hulam: śĄõŚĺ∑ŤŹĮ¬∑Ť©ĻÁīć) == Ay-dehaw.cen-na (kamu nu Amilika: Edward Jenner,caypic-sipsiw mihcaan lima a bulad caypic a demiad- caywal-tulu a mihcaan cacay a bulad tunem a demiad) , FRS FRCPE,pangangan han ci Ayde-hau. Cin-na caay sa ci Cen-na, misaydan nu Ing-kuo, nikinkiwan atu ni cuduhan u tibeni atu sapihaymawan tu tibenian a nikasingangan, caypic-siwnem mihcaan lima a bulad malahciay nida tu libung a sapicucuk nu sapayuan u sayaway nu kitakidan a sapayuan, ci Cen-na tuni ka tukuh ayda pangangan han u (caay tu ka ala nu libung a laliwamaan). śĄõŚĺ∑ŤŹĮ¬∑Ť©ĻÁīć(ŤčĪśĖá:Edward Jenner,1749ŚĻī5śúą17śó•‚ÄĒ1823ŚĻī1śúą26śó•),FRS FRCPE, ". i ayaw ni Cen-na, tademaw u sapiala tu tibeni nu picucukan sakacaay ka ala nu libung, uyniyan a kawaw i tida i Cuon-kuo, Ing-tu atu Fea-cuo matenes ku nipidaydayan, nika sakabalihenawan, caay kaw silahciay. nika ni kinkiwan a sapatahekal ni Cen-na a tibeni tu sapicucuk kapah kuyda, maadih ku nika kapah, haymaw satu tayda i hekalan nu kanatalan, mapacuwah namin ku udip nu maudipay. Caysiw-walsep mihcaan kitakiday nu pulung nu padekuan mihapu, u tibeni itini i kitakidan malawpes mapatay tu. kawaw ni Cen-na a nikinkiwan tanektek tu , ladayen nida ci Lu-yi.Pase-de, Luopuo-te'.kehe' a tademaw mikilin aca tu duma a sapingaay tu imelang. . u mahida maudip śó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ ci Cen-na pilecuhan i caypic-sipsiw mihcaan lima a bulad caypic a demiad ni lecuhan i Ing-kuo Ke-luo-se-te'-pei-ke'-li' a buksi nu lumaan, i pilucuhan nida tu Ke-luo-se-te' micudad, dikud i Lun-tun a cacayan tu ci Lu-de-luo a misaydangan minanam tu sapisenataw tu bangesan. sadikuday taluma' aca i nalecuhan, i niyadu' satu malamisaydan. malaheci ku sakay niw-duo ÁôľśėéÁČõÁóėśé•Á®ģŤ°ď tawya a Ingkuo u tademaw ku sasapalan mitaneng , kasilahecian mangalay miala tu i udipay a bena' nu imelangay, u adidiay a sapisenad nu katini' ku sapinanam i banges nu imelangay. i nanikinkiwan a imelangay nu tademaw caay kaw nu nikalalidan tu bala'an, sisa hatidaay tu nu tademaw caay tu ka hacica ku tahekalay nu ten-hua. uyniyan ni tanengan yadah henay ku la'cusay, u nitanengan a tademaw usitin-huaay a tademaw, sisa idaw ku mapatayay. nu nitanengan a tademaw kapahtu ku udip sa, nika amica ku nikakapah milalid tu tepalay a tademawan, sisa kanca aidaw ku laa'd sa. . tawyaay a niyadu' nu Ingkuo idaw ku nakamuan sa, anu namalalidtu tu niw-duo, acaay tu ka lalid tu ten-hua. nu mipuleciay tu cucu nu katalan a tataynaan nu tademaw namalaliday namin tu libungay tu niw-duo. ci Cen-na anu tatengan ku kamu nu i hekalay a tademaw, u niw-duo atu ten-hua u malecaday sa, anu mahida nanicucukan tu niw-duo taneng cucukan tu ten-hua u kapahay ku mahiniay sa. . nikahinian anipatahekalan, caypic- siwnem mihcaan lima a bulad caysip a dimiad, ci Cen-na malingatu tu mikinkiw tu niw-duo a kawawan. cinida micucuk tu niw-duo a kawawan, sakapahen nida ku nipibanaw tu katini' itidan nida i waluay a mihcaan nanay a wawaw ci Cen-muse. Faipu-se tu tusaay a abalaan, banaten nida paladuka, pacumuden nida tu niw-duo, metalaw asiten-hua. namalalid satu kida tatamaan a wawa tu niw-duo, enemay a lalipayan mangaay tu. nikuda ci Cen-na cucukan naca nida kida tatamaan a wawa tu ten-hua, alaw caay ka lalid kida tatamaan a wawa tu libungan, itini palutatengan cinida u niw-duo mikapah tu ten-hua macunus ku kapah nu udip. (James Phipps) . ci Cen-na matineng tu tuyu nipicucukan tu libung nikasilahecian, mangalay ci nida tu nika cacayan a demiad malawpes ku ten-hua i tini i kitakidan. tahsepi han nida masasuini namin misaicelang ku kitakiday a tademaw sadikuday malaheci tu, caysiw-walsep mihcaan ina ten-hua lawpes satu itini i kitakida. . duma a nipainŚÖ∂ŚģÉŤ≤ĘÁćĽ nipikinkiwan tu niw-duo a sacucuk, ci Cen-na u manamuhay miadih tu sakalihalay tu hekal a kesya-ciw. wawa nina tu-cun a ayam matineng mialaw tu duma nu ayaman a ti'kuk atu wawa nu duma a ayam micuduh patahekal, ci Cen-na tu ku makaadihay. nu nipihaymawan nida miadih, sisa ci Cen-na maadih nu Ing-kuo hun-ciw-sye-hua itida i caypic-walsiw mihcaan mala yen-se. .

tib…ôni nu pi ¶u ¶ukan saka ¶aaj ka ar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺibuŇč, ujnijan a kawaw i tida i ¶uon-kuo, iŇč-tu atu f…ôa- ¶uo mat…ôn…ôs ku nipidajdajan, nika sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan, ¶aaj kaw sir~…ĺańß ¶iaj. nika ni ¶ajsiw-war~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan kitakidaj nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu pad…ôkuan mińßapu, u tib…ôni itini i kitakidan mar~…ĺawp…ôs mapataj tu. kawaw ni ¶…ôn-na a nikinkiwan tan…ôkt…ôk tu , r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ¶i r~…ĺu-ji.pas…ô-d…ô, r~…ĺuopuo-t…ô Ē~ °.k…ôńß…ô Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw mikir~…ĺin a ¶a tu duma a sapiŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. . u mańßida maudip **** ¶i ¶…ôn-na pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ¶ajpi ¶-sipsiw mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad ¶ajpi ¶ a d…ômiad ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i iŇč-kuo k…ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ °-p…ôi-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi Ē~ ° a buksi nu r~…ĺumaan, i pir~…ĺu ¶uńßan nida tu k…ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ ° mi ¶udad, dikud i r~…ĺun-tun a ¶a ¶ajan tu ¶i r~…ĺu-d…ô-r~…ĺuo a misajdaŇčan minanam tu sapis…ônataw tu baŇč…ôsan. sadikudaj tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a ¶a i nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, i nijadu Ē~ ° satu mar~…ĺamisajdan. mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku sakaj niw-duo ******* tawja a iŇčkuo u tad…ômaw ku sasapar~…ĺan mitan…ôŇč , kasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian maŇčar~…ĺaj miar~…ĺa tu i udipaj a b…ôna Ē~ ° nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, u adidiaj a sapis…ônad nu katini Ē~ ° ku sapinanam i baŇč…ôs nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj. i nanikinkiwan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj kaw nu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan tu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an, sisa ńßatidaaj tu nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj tu ka ńßa ¶i ¶a ku tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu t…ôn-ńßua. ujnijan ni tan…ôŇčan jadańß ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj, u nitan…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw usitin-ńßuaaj a tad…ômaw, sisa idaw ku mapatajaj. nu nitan…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw kapańßtu ku udip sa, nika ami ¶a ku nikakapańß mir~…ĺar~…ĺid tu t…ôpar~…ĺaj a tad…ômawan, sisa kan ¶a aidaw ku r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d sa. . tawjaaj a nijadu Ē~ ° nu iŇčkuo idaw ku nakamuan sa, anu namar~…ĺar~…ĺidtu tu niw-duo, a ¶aaj tu ka r~…ĺar~…ĺid tu t…ôn-ńßua. nu mipur~…ĺ…ô ¶iaj tu ¶u ¶u nu katar~…ĺan a tatajnaan nu tad…ômaw namar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj namin tu r~…ĺibuŇčaj tu niw-duo. ¶i ¶…ôn-na anu tat…ôŇčan ku kamu nu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw, u niw-duo atu t…ôn-ńßua u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj sa, anu mańßida nani ¶u ¶ukan tu niw-duo tan…ôŇč ¶u ¶ukan tu t…ôn-ńßua u kapańßaj ku mańßiniaj sa. . nikańßinian anipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, ¶ajpi ¶- siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad ¶ajsip a dimiad, ¶i ¶…ôn-na mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mikinkiw tu niw-duo a kawawan. ¶inida mi ¶u ¶uk tu niw-duo a kawawan, sakapańß…ôn nida ku nipibanaw tu katini Ē~ ° itidan nida i war~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan nanaj a wawaw ¶i ¶…ôn-mus…ô. faipu-s…ô tu tusaaj a abar~…ĺaan, banat…ôn nida par~…ĺaduka, pa ¶umud…ôn nida tu niw-duo, m…ôtar~…ĺaw asit…ôn-ńßua. namar~…ĺar~…ĺid satu kida tatamaan a wawa tu niw-duo, …ôn…ômaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan maŇčaaj tu. nikuda ¶i ¶…ôn-na ¶u ¶ukan na ¶a nida kida tatamaan a wawa tu t…ôn-ńßua, ar~…ĺaw ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺid kida tatamaan a wawa tu r~…ĺibuŇčan, itini par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ¶inida u niw-duo mikapańß tu t…ôn-ńßua ma ¶unus ku kapańß nu udip. (*am…ôs pńßipps) . ¶i ¶…ôn-na matin…ôŇč tu tuju nipi ¶u ¶ukan tu r~…ĺibuŇč nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i nida tu nika ¶a ¶ajan a d…ômiad mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku t…ôn-ńßua i tini i kitakidan. tańßs…ôpi ńßan nida masasuini namin misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku kitakidaj a tad…ômaw sadikudaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu, ¶ajsiw-war~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan ina t…ôn-ńßua r~…ĺawp…ôs satu itini i kitakida. . duma a nipain**** nipikinkiwan tu niw-duo a sa ¶u ¶uk, ¶i ¶…ôn-na u manamuńßaj miadińß tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a k…ôsja- ¶iw. wawa nina tu- ¶un a ajam matin…ôŇč miar~…ĺaw tu duma nu ajaman a ti Ē~ °kuk atu wawa nu duma a ajam mi ¶uduńß patańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶i ¶…ôn-na tu ku makaadińßaj. nu nipińßajmawan nida miadińß, sisa ¶i ¶…ôn-na maadińß nu iŇč-kuo ńßun- ¶iw-sj…ô-ńßua itida i ¶ajpi ¶-war~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa j…ôn-s…ô. .
